candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: When a system is taken from state a to state b along the path acb shown in the figure below, 70 J of heat flows into the system, and the system does 30 J of work. If $U_a = 0\, \text{J}$ and $U_d = 30\, \text{J}$, determine the heat absorbed in the processes $db$ and $ad$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 当一个系统沿着下图所示的路径 acb 从状态 a 转移到状态 b 时,系统吸收了 70 J 的热量,并做了 30 J 的功。已知 $U_a = 0\, \text{J}$ 和 $U_d = 30\, \text{J}$,求过程 db 和 ad 中系统吸收的热量。
metadata.explanation_zh:
对于过程 $db$，体积没有变化，因此 $W_{db} = 0$。因此，$\Delta U_{db} = Q_{db} + W_{db} = Q_{db}$。现在，由于 $U_{ab} = +40\, \text{J}$，且 $U_a = 0\, \text{J}$，这意味着 $U_b = 40\, \text{J}$，所以 $\Delta U_{ab} = U_b - U_a = 40\, \text{J} - 0\, \text{J} = 40\, \text{J}$。因此，$Q_{db} = 40\, \text{J}$。

现在，让我们考虑过程 $ad$。由于 $W_{abd} = W_{ad} + W_{db} = W_{ad} + 0 = W_{ad}$，且 $W_{adb} = -10\, \text{J}$ [在 (b) 部分计算]，因此 $W_{ad} = -10\, \text{J}$。由于 $\Delta U_{ad} = U_d - U_a = 30\, \text{J}$，根据 $\Delta U_{ad} = Q_{ad} + W_{ad}$ 可得 $Q_{ad} = \Delta U_{ad} - W_{ad} = 30\, \text{J} - (-10\, \text{J}) = 40\, \text{J}$。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The PV diagram is readable and the text clearly defines the states and paths, so the task setup is understandable. However, the prompt appears to ask for heat in two processes (db and ad), while the provided answer is only a single number ('40'), so the expected answer signal is incomplete or ambiguous.
